g.data-notes: northeast Vastu zone, serene space for small altar.
north Vastu zone, 6-seater dining table, adjacent to kitchen for easy service.
north-east Vastu zone, open plan with sectional sofa, coffee table, entertainment unit, large windows for natural light.
floor 0 corridor — auto-injected by geometric rail
internal staircase leading to first floor.
southeast Vastu fire zone, single modular kitchen, L-counter + hob + sink on segregated wet wall, tall unit run, pass door to dining, utility door to wash/laundry — NOT a second kitchen.
standard fixtures, accessible from living area.
adjacent to kitchen, space for washing machine and storage.
